global.title: Mercedes-Benz unveils new EQS with 926 km range, 800V charging, steer-by-wire
global.summary: Mercedes-Benz has unveiled a heavily overhauled EQS electric sedan with a WLTP range of up to 926 km (575 miles), a 13% improvement over the outgoing model. The update represents the biggest upgrade to the flagship EV since it launched in 2021. The new EQS gets an entirely new 800-volt electrical ar

global.title: The Genesis GV90 interior leaked, and it’s even more luxurious than expected [Video]
global.summary: The GV90 looks like something high-ranking government officials or celebrities ride in. Genesis set out to redefine luxury with the GV90, and the interior proves it. Here’s our first look. more…

global.title: Tesla launches Spring Update 2026 with ‘Hey Grok,’ new Self-Driving app, and more
global.summary: Tesla is rolling out its Spring Update 2026 software, bringing over a dozen new features to its fleet. The highlights include a redesigned Self-Driving subscription app, voice-activated Grok, and a long-requested auto-install feature for software updates. The update also adds some fun touches, like

global.title: Rivian R2 vs Tesla Model Y spotted side-by-side: Detailed size comparison
global.summary: New photos of the Rivian R2 parked next to the Tesla Model Y are making the rounds on social media, and they offer a great look at how these two critical electric SUVs actually compare in size. The R2 is shorter in length but noticeably taller, with a boxier, more rugged profile. We decided to dig i

global.title: Kia builds the first EV3 prototypes in Mexico ahead of US sales
global.summary: Kia is finally bringing the affordable electric SUV to the US later this year. The first EV3 prototypes are now rolling off the assembly line at Kia’s plant in Mexico ahead of sales. more…

global.title: Anker SOLIX Earth Day Sale takes up to 65% off power stations + FREE gifts and exclusive bonus savings, Jackery, Worx, NAVEE, more
global.summary: Kicking off this week’s Green Deals, we have Anker SOLIX launching its massive Earth Day lineup of power station deals with three tiers of free gifts and our exclusive bonus savings code – all starting from $120. There’s also the one-day-only deal hitting Jackery’s 2,042Wh Explorer 2000 Plus Portabl

global.title: Toyota’s electric SUV was the third best-selling EV in the US in Q1
global.summary: The bZ, Toyota’s electric SUV, leaped past the Hyundai IONIQ 5, Chevy Equinox EV, and Ford Mustang Mach-E to become the third-best-selling EV in the US in the first quarter. more…

global.title: Uber begins early test rides of Lucid Gravity robotaxis equipped with Nuro autonomy systems
global.summary: Level 4 autonomous technology expert Nuro shared the latest milestone of a partnership with Uber Technologies and Lucid Motors to develop a fleet of Gravity Robotaxi SUVs. Per the company, a select group of riders has begun test rides in California. more…

global.title: Hyundai’s new ‘Venus’ IONIQ EV spotted in public for the first time [Images]
global.summary: After unveiling the new Venus and Earth last week, we are already getting our first look at Hyundai’s new IONIQ EV in real life. more…

global.title: Volkswagen promises new ID.3 and ID.4 will be ‘true’ EVs as it gears up for an all out EV blitz
global.summary: After admitting it had lost touch with buyers, Volkswagen’s CEO promises to get it right with its new EV lineup launching this year. Volkswagen’s EV blitz kicks off next week, starting with the updated ID.3. more…
